# External Validation Data

External validation notebooks are available under `notebooks/external/`:

- `lstm_AMPDiscover.ipynb`
- `lstm_DDBL.ipynb`
- `lstm_EMBL.ipynb`
- `lstm_RefSeq.ipynb`
- `lstm_SSFGM.ipynb`
- `lstm_XU.ipynb`

The current workspace contains notebook outputs and metrics, but not standalone external CSV files named `AMPDiscover.csv`, `DDBL.csv`, `EMBL.csv`, `RefSeq.csv`, `SSFGM.csv`, and `XU.csv`. Add those raw external CSV files here before public archival if journal policy requires input data in addition to executed notebooks.
